name: Settings - Revoke API token
description: After mock login, navigate to /settings, generate a token, then revoke it and verify it moves to the revoked tokens section.

planSteps.description: The API Tokens section is visible with a Generate button
Type 'revoke-test-token' in the token name input and click Generate
The new token appears in the active tokens list
Click the revoke button (trash icon or Revoke button) next to the 'revoke-test-token' entry
The token disappears from the active tokens list and either appears in the Revoked tokens section or the active list count decreases by one
